home.title1: You Were Written Five Thousand Years Ago
home.title2: Today, AI Reads It to You
home.subtitle: Bazi charts your destiny, Plum Blossom reveals gains and losses, Ziwei Dou Shu maps the twelve palaces, Liu Yao divines World Cup matchups — five millennia of metaphysical wisdom, interpreted in plain language by AI.
home.guideBanner: We recommend {saveLink} first so it auto-fills during readings. You can add multiple profiles for family and friends anytime.
home.feature1Desc: Coverage of Bazi, Plum Blossom, Ziwei Dou Shu, Liu Yao and more. Algorithms run locally with transparent, traceable charting.
home.feature2Desc: Translates classical metaphysical terminology into modern language, offering targeted analysis based on chart structure — not generic fluff.
home.feature3Desc: Chart data computed locally in real time. AI readings stream as cards — no waiting, view and share instantly.
home.feature4Desc: Save multiple birth profiles for yourself, family, and friends. Switch with one click. All data stays local.
home.toolBaziDesc: Enter your birth date and time to automatically generate the four pillars, ten gods, fortune cycles, and annual luck. AI provides structured readings on chart pattern, useful elements, clashes and combinations.
home.toolZhouyiDesc: One question, one reading. Supports time-based, number-based, and character-based casting. AI interprets the primary, mutual, and changed hexagrams' symbolism and trends.
home.toolZwdsDesc: Determines the Life Palace from birth hour, arranges the twelve palaces and fourteen major stars. AI reads your natal pattern, decade cycles, and annual changes to guide your direction.
home.toolLiuyaoDesc: Select FIFA 2026 World Cup matchups and cast six coins. AI divines win/loss from self-response strength, moving line interactions, and official-ghost direction.
home.faq1Q: What's the difference between the tools? Which should I use?
home.faq1A: Bazi focuses on life patterns and fortune cycles, ideal for understanding your overall destiny. Plum Blossom divines one question at a time, great for specific decisions or timing. Ziwei Dou Shu analyzes life domains through twelve palaces, perfect for examining career, relationships, and wealth. Liu Yao (World Cup edition) applies the same principles to predict sports outcomes. The systems complement each other.
home.faq2Q: How accurate is the chart data?
home.faq2A: All chart data is computed locally using deterministic algorithms: Bazi follows standard stem-branch and solar term rules, Plum Blossom adheres to the original text of 'Plum Blossom Numerology,' Ziwei Dou Shu uses the universally accepted star-placement formulas, and Liu Yao follows the three-coin casting method. AI interpretations may vary slightly due to model differences — treat results as self-awareness references, not absolute predictions.
home.faq3A: All profile data is stored only in your browser's localStorage and never uploaded to any server. Chart calculations happen entirely on your device. During AI readings, only structured chart data (e.g., star positions, hexagram patterns) is transmitted — no personally identifiable information. You can delete all data anytime in Settings.
home.faq4Q: What if I don't know my birth hour?
home.faq4A: Bazi and Ziwei Dou Shu require an accurate birth hour (for the Hour Pillar / Life Palace positioning). If unknown, you can use a 'Seven-Character Analysis' (year, month, day only) for partial insights, or try Plum Blossom divination or Liu Yao, which don't require birth data.
home.faq5Q: Why is each AI reading slightly different?
home.faq5A: AI readings are based on the same chart structure, but large language models naturally vary in expression — much like different diviners interpreting the same chart from different angles. Core chart information (pattern, useful elements, star distribution) is fixed; AI provides multi-dimensional perspectives.
home.faq6Q: Does being born near a solar term boundary matter?
home.faq6A: In Bazi, the Month Pillar is bounded by solar terms (not lunar month start). If born within a day of a term boundary, the system will flag 'Born near solar term boundary.' Please confirm the Month Pillar based on your actual birth time for accuracy.
home.faq7Q: What is Liu Yao World Cup prediction?
home.faq7A: Liu Yao World Cup applies traditional six-coin divination to FIFA World Cup 2026 matches. Select your matchup, cast six coins virtually, and AI analyzes self-response strength, moving line interactions, and official-ghost direction to predict outcomes. It's the same ancient method applied to modern sports — for entertainment and fun.
home.liuNianText: {name}'s {year} fortune: Bazi reveals annual trends, Ziwei shows decade patterns. Select a tool above to start.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: Terms
terms.section1Content: ososn is an online divination tool based on traditional Chinese metaphysics (Four Pillars Bazi, Zhouyi I Ching, etc.), combined with artificial intelligence to provide chart interpretations. This service is for cultural entertainment and self-awareness reference only and does not constitute any professional advice.
terms.section2Content1: All divination results provided by this website (including but not limited to Bazi charts, AI interpretations, and hexagram analysis) are for cultural entertainment reference only and do not constitute medical, psychological, legal, financial, or any other professional advice. Users should exercise their own judgment and bear all consequences of using this service.
terms.section2Content2: This website assumes no liability for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use this service.
terms.section3Content: User profile data is stored only in the browser's localStorage and is not uploaded to our servers. Users can delete all data at any time on the Settings page.
terms.section4Content: The code, design, and algorithm implementations of this website belong to ososn. Users may not copy, modify, or use them for commercial purposes without authorization.
terms.section5Content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Revised terms will be posted on this page, and continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
terms.seoDesc: ososn Terms of Use and Disclaimer. This service is for cultural entertainment reference only and does not constitute any professional advice.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Privacy
privacy.section1Content: ososn uses a pure client-side architecture. All your personal data (including birth information and profile names) is stored only in your browser's localStorage. We do not upload this data to any server and cannot access it on your device.
privacy.section2Content: When you use the AI interpretation feature, your chart information (stems, branches, ten gods, fortune cycles, etc.) is forwarded to the AI service provider through our server proxy. We do not persistently store this information on our servers; we only act as a real-time request relay.
privacy.section3Content: We do not use any third-party tracking cookies. If you have configured analytics tools such as Baidu Analytics, data collection follows the privacy policy of the corresponding service provider.
privacy.section4Content: You can delete individual profiles at any time on the 'My Profiles' page, or clear your browser's localStorage to delete all data. We cannot delete data stored on your local device on your behalf.
privacy.section5Content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us through the channels provided on the website.
privacy.seoDesc: ososn Privacy Policy. User data is stored only in the local browser. AI interpretation only transmits chart data without personally identifiable information.

fortuneRadar.title: Five-Dimensional Fortune Analysis
fortuneRadar.subtitle: Comprehensive scoring and interpretation of each dimension

relationship.high: Strong romantic fortune; likely to meet a suitable partner. Good time for social activities and expanding your circle.
relationship.mid: Steady romantic development. Requires careful cultivation; patience is key for lasting relationships.
relationship.low: Weaker romantic fortune. Focus on self-improvement first and wait for the right opportunity.

career.high: Strong career momentum with贵人 support. Excellent time to push for advancement and breakthroughs.
career.mid: Steady career progress. Build experience and credentials steadily for long-term success.
career.low: Career obstacles present. Stay low-profile, avoid major changes, and wait for better timing.

wealth.high: Strong financial inflow. Both正财 and偏财 opportunities; consider investments but know when to stop.
wealth.mid: Stable finances. Conservative approach recommended; focus on steady income over risky ventures.
wealth.low: Weak financial fortune. Practice frugality and avoid large expenditures or high-risk investments.

health.high: Excellent physical condition with abundant energy. Maintain regular habits to preserve this state.
health.mid: Stable health. Balance work and rest; watch for seasonal illnesses.
health.low: Weaker health fortune. Take care of body and mind; avoid overwork and late nights.

study.high: Excellent study fortune with quick absorption. Great time for advanced studies and certifications.
study.mid: Steady academic progress. Consistency and planning are key to results.
study.low: Academic obstacles. Consider adjusting your learning methods or seeking guidance.
